mnemonics: MOHAMED: Making Our Humanity A Main Ethical Driver for AI development
keyPoints: Mohamed is a hypothetical persona representing a diverse end-user whose needs must be considered.
Emphasizes the importance of including diverse perspectives (e.g., cultural, geographic, ability) in the AI design process.
Highlights that human-centred AI must go beyond a single, stereotypical user and consider a wide range of human experiences.
commonMistakes: Assuming 'Mohamed' refers to a specific, real person rather than a representative archetype.
Focusing only on Western or majority user perspectives, neglecting the global and diverse nature of the name.
Treating the persona as a checklist item rather than a tool for genuine empathy and user understanding.
